pages.text: Aqueducts can also move lava and other fluids around, which may be useful when building the $(l:beneath/hellforge)Hellforge$().
Hellbricks are a building block that is also used for the $(l:beneath/hellforge)Hellforge$().
The Pyroxenite Pedestal can be used to display items you want to show off!
Migmatite and Pyroxenite bricks are made like regular bricks, and that includes needing to create the brick item.
